series_metadata.series_title: Managed Care Plan and Enhanced Care Management Plan Provider Agreements
series_metadata.series_description: Provider agreements between the State of Ohio and those administering managed care plans or enhanced care management plans to provide health care services at reduced cost to Medicaid eligible recipients.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in office 5 years after agreement expires and 5 years in the records center, then destroy provided audits are complete, reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved. ; Electronic: Retain in office 5 years after agreement expires and 5 years in the records center, then destroy provided audits are complete, reports are released and all discrepancies are resolved., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
